name: Skyrim RPG
description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Tamriel with the Skyrim RPG bot.

From the snowy peaks of the Throat of the World to the bustling city of Whiterun, this bot offers a personalized and engaging experience. Engage in epic quests, encounter mythical creatures, and forge your own destiny in this vast and open-world adventure.

If have any suggestions or problems with the bot feel free to comment about it and I will update it soon😁.
creator: Plagu3
